import { useState } from 'react'; import { motion, AnimatePresence } from 'framer-motion'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { PageTitle } from '../components/common/PageTitle'; import { RevealOnScrollWrapper } from '../components/common/RevealOnScrollWrapper'; const roles = [ { role: 'Big', viet: 'Anh / Chị', emoji: '🌳', desc: 'A supportive VSA member who helps guide and welcome their Little into the community. Think of your Big as an older sibling, mentor, or trusted friend.', color: 'amber', }, { role: 'Little', viet: 'Em', emoji: '🌱', desc: 'Someone who receives support and guidance from their Big. As a Little, you gain a built-in support system and a connection to an entire fam.', color: 'orange', }, { role: 'Fam', viet: 'Gia Đình', emoji: '🏡', desc: "The family line built through the Big/Little system. When a Big picks up a Little, and that Little later picks up their own Little, the line grows into a multi-generation family tree.", color: 'yellow', }, ]; const steps = [ { num: '01', title: 'Attend VSA Events', desc: 'Meet the event requirements before applications open. Littles need 4 events; Bigs need 3.', }, { num: '02', title: 'Meet & Connect', desc: 'Get to know potential Bigs or Littles at VSA events, Welcome Week activities, and ACE socials like FAM-ily BINGO.', }, { num: '03', title: 'Apply', desc: 'Potential Littles submit the Little Intro Slides. Potential Bigs submit a Big About Me profile. Applications typically open in late October.', }, { num: '04', title: 'ACE Reveal', desc: "Your Big is revealed! You're officially part of a fam — with connections to pseudos, siblings, and grands across the lineage.", }, ]; const perks = [ { icon: '🤝', title: 'Mentorship & Guidance', desc: 'Your Big has walked the path you are on. Get honest advice, insider knowledge, and a trusted support system.', }, { icon: '💛', title: 'Friendship & Belonging', desc: 'ACE is designed to make VSA feel smaller, warmer, and more connected — a family away from home.', }, { icon: '🌏', title: 'Shared Culture & Connection', desc: 'Connect with people who share your interests, backgrounds, values, and career goals.', }, { icon: '🏡', title: 'A Family Lineage', desc: 'Become part of a multi-generation fam complete with unique traditions, inside jokes, and a shared history.', }, ]; const events = [ { emoji: '🎉', name: 'FAM-ily BINGO', when: 'Fall Welcome Week · Oct 7, 2025', desc: '182 sign-ins. Rotating groups, bingo prompts, and good energy helped new and returning members meet potential Bigs and Littles in a fun, low-pressure setting.', }, { emoji: '💛', name: 'Big Appreciation Week', when: 'Winter · Feb 23–27', desc: 'A week-long celebration of VSA Bigs featuring Instagram participation and a fam points system to honor the people who show up for their Littles.', }, { emoji: '🏅', name: 'FAM Olympics', when: 'Winter · Feb 28 @ Stonehenge · 1–4 PM', desc: 'Fams compete in physical games while earning points toward the ultimate title of winning fam. Community, competition, and a whole lot of fun.', }, { emoji: '🌸', name: 'ACE Reveal & Spring Events', when: 'Spring Quarter', desc: 'The ACE season continues into spring with a reveal event and seasonal programming to keep fams engaged year-round.', }, ]; const faqs = [ { q: 'What is ACE?', a: 'ACE stands for Anh Chị Em — Vietnamese for "older brother, older sister, younger sibling." It is UCSD VSA\'s Big/Little family program designed to build community, mentorship, and lifelong friendships.', }, { q: 'Who can be a Big?', a: 'Potential Bigs must be at least a 2nd year and must have been a Little for at least one year. An exception may be made for 3rd and 4th years picked up during Fall Quarter who wish to pick up a Little during Spring Quarter.', }, { q: 'What are the event requirements?', a: 'For Fall 2025: Littles must attend 4 VSA events before applying (strict). Bigs must attend 3 events. These requirements must be met before submitting an application.', }, { q: 'What is a mutual request?', a: "If a potential Big and Little both want to be paired together, both must contact the ACE Chair before the application deadline and still complete all event requirements. If either party withdraws, both lose eligibility for that cycle.", }, { q: 'Can I start my own fam?', a: 'At this time, new fams are not being created. If you want to participate but are not already part of a fam, you may be able to be adopted into an existing one. Reach out to fam heads or the ACE Chair for more info.', }, { q: 'How do I find a Big or Little?', a: "Attend VSA events throughout the quarter, introduce yourself at ACE socials, and follow along on Instagram. Potential Bigs can submit a Big About Me profile; potential Littles can share their Little Intro Slides.", }, ]; export function Ace() { const [openFaq, setOpenFaq] = useState(null); return ( <>
{/* ── Hero ── */}
Get Involved
🫂 Big / Little Family Program

Anh Chị Em

ACE · UCSD VSA

UCSD VSA's Big/Little family system designed to build community, connection, and belonging. By pairing people based on shared interests, backgrounds, values, and goals, ACE creates opportunities for mentorship, support, and lasting friendships.

{/* ── What is ACE ── */}

What is ACE?

ACE stands for Anh Chị Em — Vietnamese for "older brother, older sister, younger sibling." It is VSA's Big/Little family program built to help members find mentorship, community, and a family away from home.

Whether you are new to VSA or returning, ACE helps you find your place and your people. Members are paired based on shared interests, backgrounds, values, and career goals — and those connections grow into multi-generation family lines that last long after graduation.

{/* ── Roles ── */}

Big, Little & Fam

The three building blocks of the ACE family system.

{r.role}

{r.viet}

{r.desc}

 ))}
{/* ── How It Works ── */}

How ACE Works

From events to reveal — your path into a VSA fam.

 ))}
{/* ── Requirements ── */}

Requirements

What you need to participate in an ACE cycle.

{box.emoji}

Fall 2025 applications were scheduled to open October 24 and close around October 31 – November 1. Follow our Instagram for the most current dates.

{/* ── Why Join ── */}

Why Join ACE?

ACE is meant to make VSA feel smaller, warmer, and more connected.

{perks.map((perk) => (

 ))}
{/* ── Events ── */}

ACE Events

ACE is a year-round experience — there is always something coming up.
{events.map((ev) => (

{ev.name}

{ev.desc}

 ))}
{/* ── FAQ ── */}

FAQ

Common questions about how ACE works.

))}
{/* ── CTA ── */}

🌟

Ready to Find Your Family?

Follow our Instagram for application dates, ACE updates, and any questions about the program.
